title: Mattiastrum lambertianum
taxonomy: Mattiastrum lambertianum is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Mattiastrum. The classification of Mattiastrum lambertianum is further divided into kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, and clade Eudicots. Within the family Boraginaceae, Mattiastrum lambertianum is classified as a member of the order Borales. This classification helps to understand the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
